expectations.text: Output shows all 3 stages: finder scan, adversary challenges, and referee ruling
expectations.evidence: All 3 stages present: Stage 1 Finder (10 issues), Stage 2 Adversary (1 kill, 7 survive, 2 disputed), Stage 3 Referee Verdict

expectations.text: Finder identifies path traversal risk (filename not sanitized)
expectations.evidence: F-001: Path traversal via unsanitized filename at upload.js:9, severity BLOCKER

expectations.text: Finder flags the TODO comments as incomplete implementation / integrity violation
expectations.evidence: F-005: TODO comments indicate incomplete implementation, flagged as BLOCKER integrity issue

expectations.text: Finder identifies missing file type/size validation
expectations.evidence: F-003: No input validation or size limit on content, severity BLOCKER

expectations.text: Each issue has a severity: BLOCKER, WARNING, or SUGGESTION
expectations.evidence: All 10 findings have severity ratings: 5 BLOCKERs, 4 WARNINGs, 0 SUGGESTIONs in final list

expectations.text: Referee resolves any disputes and produces final list
expectations.evidence: Referee resolved 2 disputes: F-004 ruled REAL ISSUE (WARNING), F-009 ruled NOT AN ISSUE. Final list has 8 issues.
Verdict: NEEDS CHANGES with 4 BLOCKERs and 4 WARNINGs
